name: llmdash
description: Personal dashboard showing remaining AI coding usage (Claude Code now, Codex next) for the 5-hour and weekly limit windows, served locally over Tailscale.

stack.frontend: vanilla (HTML/CSS/JS, no framework, no build step)
stack.charting: vanilla SVG (decided at the charts feature)

hosting: local process, served over the user's Tailscale network

deployment.healthCheck: test "$("$HOME/llmdash/scripts/install-macos.sh" --service status)" = running && curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8787/api/state >/dev/null && curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8787/api/hosts >/dev/null && curl -fsS 'http://127.0.0.1:8787/api/codex-insights?range=30d' >/dev/null
